summary: Training Progress Dashboard testing complete. 23/24 backend tests passed (1 timeout due to event loop saturation). All frontend components verified: PhaseTracker, PhaseRow, auto-poll useEffect, data-testids. PHASE_CONFIGS has 10 phases, TrainingPipelineStatus auto-transitions work correctly.

minor.issue: Intermittent timeout due to IB Gateway event loop saturation (not a code bug)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: PHASE_CONFIGS has 10 phases: generic_directional, setup_specific, short_setup_specific, volatility_prediction, exit_timing, sector_relative, risk_of_ruin, regime_conditional, ensemble_meta, cnn_patterns
VERIFIED: Each phase has label, order (1-10), phase_num, expected_models
VERIFIED: TrainingPipelineStatus.update(phase=X) auto-starts new phase and auto-ends previous phase
VERIFIED: add_completed() increments models_trained and computes running avg_accuracy
VERIFIED: add_error() increments models_failed in current phase
VERIFIED: GET /api/ai-training/status returns pipeline_status with phase_history when training data exists
VERIFIED: GET /api/ai-training/model-inventory returns 108 total_defined models with 28 regime_conditional
VERIFIED: Frontend ALL_PHASES constant has 10 entries matching backend PHASE_CONFIGS
VERIFIED: Auto-poll useEffect with 5s interval and isTraining dependency (lines 446-450)
VERIFIED: No TDZ error - isTraining declared at line 443 before useEffect at line 446
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for these endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Training Progress Dashboard fully implemented. PHASE_CONFIGS has 10 phases with expected_models counts. TrainingPipelineStatus class auto-transitions phases via update(). PhaseTracker component only renders when phase_history exists (during/after training). Auto-poll every 5s during training. IB Gateway unavailable in container causes event loop saturation - use route mocking for frontend tests.
mocked_api_note: Ollama LLM and IB Gateway are MOCKED/unavailable in container
